items.description:
Fits It-Girl Style Platform Doll By Polarberrys - https://www.roblox.com/bundles/894898/It-Girl-Style-Platform-Doll

Dark, sleek and seductive the Midnight Heart Cut Platform Boots turn classic black into a bold Valentine statement.
The heart-shaped cutout contrasts the edgy platform silhouette, revealing the leg for a confident and flirty finish.
Perfect for alt looks, glam night outfits, gothic y2k aesthetics or bold romantic fits.
